title: habenaria entomantha var. subauriculata
intro: Habenaria entomantha var. subauriculata, also known as the Asian yellow orchid, is a plant species in the genus Habenaria, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria entomantha var. subauriculata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
